data.description:
# WU-1 — TAG_DELTA event type + reducer core

Foundation work unit: introduce the `TAG_DELTA` event type and teach the reducer
to apply it convergently. No interface emits it yet — this unit only makes the
store *understand* the event, so it ships green and unblocks the writer units.

## What / Scope

- Define `TAG_DELTA = "TAG_DELTA"` in `src/rebar/reducer/_version.py` and
  reference the constant INSIDE `KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES` (same file) and inside
  `EVENT_TYPES` in `src/rebar/_store/event_append.py` (import the constant) so the
  literal cannot drift between the two sets.
- Update the human-readable type list embedded in the `event_append` validation
  error string (`src/rebar/_store/event_append.py:~91`).
- Bump `SCHEMA_VERSION` 2→3 in `reducer/_version.py` (documentation only; no
  consumer gates on the integer — forward-compat is via `KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES`).
- Add `process_tag_delta(state, data)` in `src/rebar/reducer/_processors.py`,
  placed beside `process_commits`/`process_workflow_*`. Signature is
  `(state, data)` like `process_edit` (NOT the 3-arg shape). `isinstance(list)`
  guards on `data["added"]`/`data["removed"]` (non-list ⇒ treat as empty, mirror
  `process_commits` :429-436). Apply to `state["tags"]`: remove every present tag
  in `removed`, then union every absent tag in `added`. Idempotent on replay.
  **Intra-event conflict contract: add wins** (remove-first-then-add) — a
  first-class, tested invariant, NOT delegated to the command layer.
- Wire `TAG_DELTA` into the replay dispatch (mirror the EDIT dispatch line).

## Delivery / green state

Reducer replays `TAG_DELTA` correctly; the type validates on write; no emitter
exists yet (`process_edit` tags handling untouched). Full suite green.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `TAG_DELTA` constant defined in `reducer/_version.py` and used inside both
      `KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES` and `_store/event_append.py` `EVENT_TYPES`
- [ ] `event_append` error-string type list includes TAG_DELTA; a test asserts
      `EVENT_TYPES ⊆ error-string` (guards future drift)
- [ ] `SCHEMA_VERSION == 3`
- [ ] `process_tag_delta(state, data)` with non-list guards, remove-then-add,
      idempotent replay, wired into dispatch
- [ ] Reducer unit tests: idempotent replay, intra-event add-wins, non-list
      defensive guards
- [ ] Full test suite green
data.title: WU-1 — TAG_DELTA event type + reducer core
